headline: A Look At A. O. Smith (AOS) Valuation After Analyst Downgrades And Softer Growth Outlook
summary: Recent analyst moves have put A. O. Smith (AOS) under a sharper spotlight, as JPMorgan and DA Davidson issued downgrades following lowered company guidance, softer North American residential demand, and a weaker outlook for China tied to declining consumer confidence. See our latest analysis for A. O. Smith. The recent downgrades and softer guidance come against a backdrop where the share price has fallen 30.39% over the past 90 days and the 1-year total shareholder return is down 18.90%,...

headline: DA Davidson Lowers A. O. Smith (AOS) PT amid Housing and China Weakness
summary: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) is included among the 11 Best Rising Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 4, DA Davidson lowered its price recommendation on A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) to $67 from $75. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares following the company’s Q1 earnings miss. The firm said demand […]
